project: AIEX-001 — Riemann Hypothesis via Sedenion Forcing
description: High-density 500-point ZDTP regime detection sweep across sigma in [0.1, 2.0] at the first Riemann zero gamma_1 = 14.134725. Differential slope analysis to identify the Euler Snap phase transition signature and characterize the four structural regimes of the sedenion forcing functional.

critical_line_apex.interpretation: Energy minimum — d2 negative concave down, d1 approximately zero

euler_snap.interpretation: Euler product absolute convergence boundary — d2 spike 3.69x larger than critical line curvature. Sharp elbow confirmed.

interpretation.detail: HMM Classification: bear (confidence: 0.950, mu_returns: -0.005697). Structural Analysis (Chavez Transform in 32D sedenion space): Conjugation symmetry: 0.3446, Stability score: 0.7680, Pattern persistence: 0.5000, Zero divisor activity: 0 patterns, State classification: UNSTABLE. Convergence Analysis: Statistical and structural methods show agreement (0.800). Both frameworks indicate stable bear regime with high structural coherence.
interpretation.methodology: Dual-method validation: HMM (statistical baseline) + Chavez Transform conjugation symmetry in 32D Cayley-Dickson space. Agreement: 0.800, Confidence: 0.875

methodology_details.hmm_implementation: Rolling window HMM with Gaussian emissions. Window = min(50, T/4). Regime: mu>0.001=bull, mu<-0.001=bear, else sideways.
methodology_details.chavez_transform: Bilateral zero divisor kernel in 32D pathion space: K_Z(P,Q,x) = |P·x|² + |x·Q|² + |Q·x|² + |x·P|² where (P,Q) from Canonical Six.
methodology_details.symmetry_metric: Conjugation symmetry in [0,1] via eigenvalue distribution analysis of transformed data.
methodology_details.zero_divisor_detection: Pattern matching against 84 sedenion zero divisor templates.

multi_ai_workflow.Claude_Desktop: Experimental design, data generation, differential slope analysis, documentation

connections.bilateral_collapse_iff_RH: EXP-05 delta values bound the epsilon-neighborhood in which ZDTP forcing exceeds 99% coherence — directly feeds BilateralCollapseProof.lean epsilon-delta argument
connections.asymptotic_rigidity: Exp 5 confirms finite-scale forcing is not asymptotic only; Euler Snap at sigma=1.0 is structurally distinct from energy minimum at sigma=0.5
connections.phase_55_56_transparency_peak: n=5000 peak stability confirmed; forcing pressure non-trivial at finite scale
